headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -67.7)
key_insights: Fears trending up 56% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes, nearly 80% at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score sits in the upper-middle range of recent activity, showing sustained high irritation levels.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism declined further into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
